overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character walking along a tropical beachfront promenade lined with palm trees, passing the Sheraton Waikiki Hotel, then ascending to a terrace overlooking a pool area. The scene features bright sunny weather and resort architecture typical of a video game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beachfront promenade with palm tree avenue

events.description: text overlay 'SHERATON WAIKIKI HOTEL' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the palm tree lined path with the ocean visible to the left and hotel to the right

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the promenade creating dappled shadows on the ground
calm turquoise ocean visible beyond the palm trees
tall beige hotel building with multiple balconies and red awnings
blue swimming pool adjacent to the hotel building
wide paved walkway with geometric shadow patterns from the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny tropical promenade lined with palm trees, with the ocean to the left and the Sheraton Waikiki Hotel visible to the right. Text briefly appears identifying the location as the character continues walking through the dappled shadows.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still

agents.ego_description: pausing to look around at the ocean view and surrounding palm trees, turning to face different directions

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking and stands on the promenade, panning the camera to look around at the tropical scenery including the ocean and palm trees. After observing the surroundings, she resumes walking toward the hotel terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel terrace approach with stone retaining walls

events.description: character begins ascending stone stairs to upper terrace level

agents.ego_description: walking toward the hotel terrace and climbing the stone stairs to the upper level

entered.detail: textured stone retaining wall with stairs leading up to the terrace
row of red patio umbrellas on the upper terrace
round white tables with chairs arranged under the umbrellas
curved stone staircase with metal railings leading up to terrace

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the hotel terrace, passing the last of the palm trees, and begins ascending the curved stone stairs. Red umbrellas and outdoor dining furniture become visible on the upper level as she climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel terrace with pool view and outdoor dining

agents.ego_description: walking around the terrace area overlooking the swimming pool and surrounding resort buildings

entered.detail: large blue swimming pool surrounded by sandy colored deck
distinctive pink multi-story hotel building with green roof
cluster of high-rise buildings visible in the distance beyond the pool
curved modern hotel building with red trim and multiple floors

segments.scene_description: Now on the upper terrace, the character walks among the outdoor dining tables and red umbrellas, overlooking a large swimming pool and the surrounding resort complex including a distinctive pink building and distant city skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched tropical promenade up onto an elevated resort terrace. It begins with the character walking through the dappled shadows of palm trees between the ocean and the Sheraton Waikiki Hotel. As the character pauses to pan across the coastal scenery, the perspective then shifts back forward, moving past the final palms toward the hotel entrance. The camera follows her as she ascends curved stone stairs, where the view opens up to reveal red umbrellas and outdoor dining furniture. Finally, the scene expands across the upper terrace, gliding past the tables to overlook a large swimming pool, a distinctive pink building, and the distant city skyline.
